title: ophiorrhiza australiana subsp. heterostyla
intro: Ophiorrhiza australiana subsp. heterostyla, also known as the Australian snake flower, is a plant species native to Australia, belonging to the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. In terms of herbal preparations, Ophiorrhiza australiana subsp. heterostyla is often made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
